nasb.text: “Command the sons of Israel that they send away from the camp every leper and everyone having a discharge and everyone who is unclean because of a dead person.

esv.text: “Command the people of Israel that they put out of the camp everyone who is leprous or has a discharge and everyone who is unclean through contact with the dead.

cnv.text: “你要吩咐以色列人，把所有患痲風病的，患漏症的，以及因接觸死人而不潔的，都送出營外；

ccb.text: “你吩咐以色列人把所有患麻风病、漏症和因碰过死尸而不洁净的人，
